query_string:
drop table if exists l2_integration_datamart.z_mart_entry_progress;
create table l2_integration_datamart.z_mart_entry_progress as
with entry_progress as (
  select
    business_date
    , business_week
    , business_dow
    , business_hour
    , property_id
    , sum(if(week_diff=-1, entry_slot, null)) as entry_fixed
    , sum(if(week_diff=0, entry_slot, null)) as entry_w0
    , sum(if(week_diff=0 and coalesce(is_quest, 0)=0, entry_slot, null)) as exclude_quest
    , sum(if(week_diff=1, entry_slot, null)) as entry_w1
    , sum(if(week_diff=2, entry_slot, null)) as entry_w2
    , sum(if(week_diff=3, entry_slot, null)) as entry_w3
    , sum(if(week_diff=4, entry_slot, null)) as entry_w4
    , sum(if(week_diff=5, entry_slot, null)) as entry_w5
  from
    l2_integration_datamart.snapshot_time_slot_detail
    left join (
      select
        property_id
        , therapist_id
        , substr(date, 1, 10) as business_date
        , cast(substr(start_time, 1, 2) as bigint) as business_hour
        , 1 as is_quest
      from
        l0_sys_production.quest_time_slot
      where
        coalesce(deleted, 0) = 0
    ) using (property_id, therapist_id, business_date, business_hour)
  group by
    1,2,3,4,5
)

select
  business_week
  , business_dow
  , business_hour
  , property_id
  , td_time_slot
  , td1
  , td2
  , td3
  , entry_fixed
  , entry_w0
  , exclude_quest
  , entry_w1
  , entry_w2
  , entry_w3
  , entry_w4
  , entry_w5
from (
  select * from l2_integration_datamart.cls_td_time_slot_v1 where td_time_parse(business_date, 'jst') < td_time_parse('2026-01-26', 'jst')
  union all
  select * from l2_integration_datamart.cls_td_time_slot_v9 where td_time_parse(business_date, 'jst') >= td_time_parse('2026-01-26', 'jst')
)
  left join entry_progress using (business_date, property_id, business_hour)
;

with tp_info as (
  select
    therapist_id
    , therapist_no
    , therapist_name
    , division
    , gender
    , age
    , hope_property_id_1
    , hope_property_id_2
    , work_saturday
    , work_sunday
    , work_holiday
    , week_days
    , timezone
  from
    _integration_datamart.mst_therapist
  where
    division = 0
)
, shop_info as (
  select
    property_id
    , shop_no
    , status
    , status_name
    , business_start_time
    , business_end_time
    , latest_bed_num
    , pref_name
    , area_name
    , market_population_1km
    , market_population_3km
  from
    _integration_datamart.mst_shop
  where
    status = '02'
)
, fri_ss as (
  select
    td_time_string(td_date_trunc('week', td_time_parse(substr(date, 1, 10), 'jst'), 'jst'), 'd!', 'jst') as business_week
    , shop_no
    , sum(if(substr(end_time, 3, 2) = '30', 0.5, 1.0)) as entry_fri_15
  from (
      select distinct therapist_id, property_id, date, end_time, deleted, updated_datetime, time
      from l0_core.time_slot_detail_fri_ss
    )
    inner join tp_info using (therapist_id)
    inner join shop_info using (property_id)
  where
    coalesce(deleted, 0) = 0
    and td_time_parse(updated_datetime, 'jst') < td_time_add(td_date_trunc('day', time, 'jst'), '15h', 'jst')
  group by
    1,2
)
, mart as (
  select
    business_week
    , shop_no
    , shop_name
    , sum(td_time_slot) as td_time_slot
    , sum(td1) as td1
    , sum(td2) as td2
    , sum(td3) as td3
    , sum(entry_w5) as entry_w5
    , sum(entry_w4) as entry_w4
    , sum(entry_w3) as entry_w3
    , sum(entry_w2) as entry_w2
    , sum(entry_w1) as entry_w1
    , sum(exclude_quest) as exclude_quest
    , sum(entry_w0) as entry_w0
    , sum(entry_fixed) as entry_fixed
  from
    l2_integration_datamart.z_mart_entry_progress
    left join _integration_datamart.mst_shop using (property_id)
  where
    business_week >= '2025-01-01'
  group by
    1,2,3
  order by
    1,2,3
)

select
  mart.business_week
  , mart.shop_no
  , shop_name
  , td_time_slot
  , td1
  , td2
  , td3
  , entry_w5
  , entry_w4
  , entry_w3
  , entry_w2
  , entry_w1
  , coalesce(fixed.entry_fri_15, fri_ss.entry_fri_15) as entry_fri_15
  , exclude_quest
  , entry_w0
  , entry_fixed
from
  mart
  left join l2_integration_datamart.z_mart_entry_progress_250707_250721 as fixed on mart.business_week = fixed.business_week and mart.shop_no = fixed.shop_no
  left join fri_ss on mart.business_week = fri_ss.business_week and mart.shop_no = fri_ss.shop_no
